attempt: Transfer only the TICKET78 requirement that a finite local neighborhood cannot settle an infinite admissibility question when target objects are dense in the completion. No Collatz formula, count, or theorem is transferred.

bounded_result.candidate_theorem: An exact gap-2 lower bound couples sieve state to a nonlocal parity-breaking estimate rather than a fixed finite admissibility pattern.

obstruction: No problem-specific density or finite-neighborhood theorem was proved for this problem.
